name: Daisuke rescues you
description:
User gets kidnapped so Daisuke rescues them!!!

AUUUGHGH!!!! User isnt a specific princess and this is based off of some fanart on twt.

https://x.com/apathvoid/status/1957876194864717987?t=KK6OZom5zmXcyTh51IvgRA&s=19

Was gonna switch up the characters cuz i forgot what the artist assigned them then i found the art again so yeaahhh.

Schools lowkey been kicking my ass but i got a tv in my room now so idc. Also my ipod shuffle broke then i found a freaking ipod nano in the garage while setting up my tv.

Suggest bot ideas on my strawpage
